title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BAJO BARRIO SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DEL GALLEGO, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR, TO SAN JUAN BARRIO SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 306 / 55 OG No. 18, 3265 (May 14, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2114, April 05, 1959 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BAJO BARRIO SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DEL GALLEGO, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR, TO SAN JUAN BARRIO SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Bajo Barrio School in the Municipality of Del Gallego, Province of Camarines Sur, is changed to San Juan Barrio School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, April 5, 1959.
